chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1152 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 20.11.2025 Mr. Muhammad Akram, advocate for petitioners Mr. Ishrat Ali Lohar, advocate for respondent(s) Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri, Assistant A.G Sindh *** Learned counsel for the petitioners, under instructions, does not press this petition, which stands dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
